case_title: GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, VS. COLLEEN KIEFER et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KIEFER, COLLEEN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT **PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION**, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, DOING BUSINESS AS THE GATEWAY SERVED MAR-19-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KIEFER, COLLEEN
DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE: COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, DOING BUSINESS AS THE GATEWAY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, DOING BUSINESS AS THE GATEWAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIEFER, COLLEEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 550 BATTERY STREET, APARTMENT 308, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94111, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, DOING BUSINESS AS THE GATEWAY AS TO DEFENDANT KIEFER, COLLEEN DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
